rule_metadata.name: hashcat
rule_metadata.description: Detection patterns for the tool 'hashcat' taken from the ThreatHunting-Keywords github project
rule_metadata.author: @mthcht

rules.rule_text:
rule hashcat
{
	meta:
		description = "Detection patterns for the tool 'hashcat' taken from the ThreatHunting-Keywords github project"
		author = "@mthcht"
		reference = "https://github.com/mthcht/ThreatHunting-Keywords"
		tool = "hashcat"
		rule_category = "offensive_tool_keyword"

	strings:
		$string1 = /\s\-\-dc\-ip\s.{0,1000}\s\-request\s.{0,1000}\s\-format\shashcat/
		$string2 = /\sntlm\.wordlist\s.{0,1000}\-\-hex\-wordlist/
		$string3 = "hashcat"
		$string4 = /hashcat\-.{0,1000}\.7z/
		$string5 = /hashcat\.git/
		$string6 = "hashcat/hashcat"

	condition:
		any of them
}
